name: group_not_allowlisted
summary: Operator has explicitly opted into `groupPolicy: allowlist` and listed a different chat. Alice chats (without mentioning the bot) in this non-allowlisted group. From Roam's perspective the webhook still delivers; the plugin no-ops. expectedApiCalls is empty. (The mention branch of this scenario posts a one-time courtesy notice; that's covered by inbound.test.ts.)
